issues.description: Card text contains '[Your Turn]' prefix indicating effects only work during your turn. DSL missing duration:'DuringYourTurn' on both triggers.
SearchDeck filter is incomplete. Must specify: type='Animal' (not name-based), power limit 4000, and rested state. Current filter uses 'ByName' which is incorrect for type-based search.
Action missing quantity constraint. Text states 'up to 1' card but DSL does not restrict quantity.
Destination 'board' is incomplete. Must specify card enters 'rested' state per card text 'play...rested'.
Missing action for deck ordering. Text requires 'place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order' but DSL has no corresponding action.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Your Turn] [On Play]/[When Attacking] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck and play up to 1 {Animal} type Character card with 4000 power or less rested. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
